mapper.select: SELECT team_id FROM agency_team_member_rel WHERE member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_team_member_rel(team_id, member_id, status) VALUES(#{teamId}, #{memberId}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE agency_team_member_rel SET team_id = #{teamId}, status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
